title: How to sum the top N values in a range
task: Add up just the largest few numbers, e.g. your top 3 sales.

excel.note: Change {1,2,3} to {1,2,3,4,5} etc. for a different N.

explanation: LARGE(range, {1,2,3}) returns the 1st, 2nd and 3rd largest values as an array (50, 40, 30); SUMPRODUCT adds them up to 120. Expand the array constant to sum a different number of top values.
